## Acceptance criteria
<!-- What needs to be true for this issue to be done -->

- [ ] Works on mobile
- [ ] Works on desktop
- [ ] Responsive
- [ ] Accessible (WCAG basics)
- [ ] No console errors
- [ ] Matches design / UI
